title: Graceful HTTP Server Shutdown with Go
summary: Run an HTTP server until a context is canceled, then finish in-flight requests within a shutdown timeout.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers serving requests before shutdown, waiting for an in-flight request, shutdown timeout errors, serve errors from a bad listener, and invalid input for the server, listener, or timeout.
